home.title: Hot Air Balloon Empordà & Costa Brava | Airona Globus — Girona
home.description: Sunrise hot air balloon flights over the Empordà and Costa Brava. Unique views of the Mediterranean and Pyrenees. Shared, private or gift vouchers. Book online from Colomers, Girona.

experiences.title: Hot Air Balloon Experiences | Airona Globus — Empordà, Costa Brava
experiences.description: Choose your balloon flight over the Empordà: shared, private or a 1-year gift voucher. AESA-certified pilots. Cava toast and 360° photos included. Departures from Colomers.

sharedFlight.title: Shared Hot Air Balloon Flight Empordà | Airona Globus — Costa Brava
sharedFlight.description: Shared hot air balloon flight over the Empordà. Groups up to 8 people, 1-hour sunrise flight, cava toast and 360° photos included. Departing from Colomers, Girona.

privateFlight.title: Private Hot Air Balloon Flight Girona | Airona Globus — Exclusive Experience
privateFlight.description: Private hot air balloon flight over the Costa Brava and Empordà. Just for you and your group. Personalised, intimate and premium service. AESA-certified pilots. Book now.

gift.title: Hot Air Balloon Gift Voucher | Airona Globus — Valid 1 Year
gift.description: Gift a hot air balloon flight over the Empordà. Instant downloadable voucher, valid for 1 year. The recipient chooses the date. The most exciting gift in Catalonia.

flightZone.title: Hot Air Balloon Flight Zone Empordà & Costa Brava | Airona Globus
flightZone.description: We depart from Colomers and fly over the Empordà, Costa Brava and the medieval landscapes of Girona. Views of the Mediterranean, the Pyrenees and the Alt and Baix Empordà fields.

about.title: About Us — Airona Globus | Hot Air Balloon Experts, Empordà
about.description: Airona Globus, specialists in hot air balloon flights over the Empordà and Costa Brava. AESA-certified pilots, over 10 years of experience and thousands of passengers in the sky.

faq.title: Hot Air Ballooning FAQ | Airona Globus
faq.description: Everything about hot air balloon flights: safety, duration, schedules, what to wear, restrictions, pricing and how to book. Clear answers from the Airona Globus team.

contact.title: Contact — Airona Globus | Hot Air Balloon Flights Empordà, Girona
contact.description: Questions about our balloon flights? Call +34 652 907 515 or send us a message. Departures from Colomers, Girona. We fly year-round when conditions allow.

blog.title: Blog — Hot Air Balloon Flights & Adventures in the Empordà | Airona Globus
blog.description: Articles, guides and tips on hot air ballooning in the Empordà, Costa Brava and Girona. Real stories, unique landscapes and adventure tourism in Catalonia.
